_source: NIST SP 800-61, CISA IRPBs, SANS Incident Handler Handbook
_note: Long-tail IR data. Specific enough to execute under pressure. Covers 2026 threat landscape.

6_lessons_learned: Report to leadership + regulators if required

first_30_minutes: ISOLATE: Disconnect affected hosts from network (pull cable, not shutdown)
PRESERVE: Snapshot memory + disk before any changes
SCOPE: Check if domain controller, backup servers, ESXi hosts affected
NOTIFY: CISO, Legal, Executive team, Cyber Insurance carrier
LOCK: Reset all service account passwords, disable VPN access
CHECK: Are backups intact? Air-gapped? Test restore immediately
do_not: Do NOT reboot (may trigger ransom trigger or destroy volatile evidence)
Do NOT pay without consulting law enforcement and legal
Do NOT communicate over compromised email (attacker may monitor)
Do NOT image over evidence before forensic collection
ransomware.law_enforcement: Notify FBI IC3 (ic3.gov) + CISA (1-888-282-0870); required for critical infrastructure
ransomware.average_recovery_time: 21 days with backups; 45+ days without clean backups

detection_signals: Large outbound data transfer to unknown IP
Compression tools (7zip, rar) executed on sensitive file servers
DNS tunneling: abnormally long DNS queries
first_steps: IDENTIFY: What data was accessed? (PII, PHI, PCI, IP?)
SCOPE: Source IP, user account, timeframe, volume
CONTAIN: Block egress at firewall; revoke cloud API keys if involved
LEGAL: Breach notification laws vary by jurisdiction — start clock (GDPR 72hr, CCPA, HIPAA 60 day)

notification_timelines.PCI_DSS: Immediately to payment brands and acquirer

first_steps: REVOKE: Invalidate all active sessions (Azure AD: Revoke-AzureADUserAllRefreshToken)
AUDIT: Check email forwarding rules, OAuth app grants, inbox rules created
SEARCH: Did attacker create new accounts, add MFA devices, change recovery email?
INVESTIGATE: What did attacker access? Email, SharePoint, Teams, OneDrive?

insider_threat.severity: HIGH — sensitive due to HR/legal involvement
indicators: Bulk download of sensitive files before resignation
Accessing files unrelated to job function
Emailing to personal account or USB transfers
Accessing competitor websites on corporate network
insider_threat.key_caveat: Must involve HR, Legal, and management before interviewing subject
